ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Avio Smart Market Stack (ASMS) has partnered with Intellecap to digitally empower Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs) and strengthen rural value chains, leveraging ASMS's "AVIO SMART platform" to enhance digital capabilities, financial inclusion, and market access. This collaboration represents a material step for ASMS in expanding its agritech and rural commerce ecosystem, though the initial submission of this press release required a same-day revision due to an "inadvertent error," indicating a minor procedural oversight.
